stepLabel.chooseExperiment: Choose an experiment to begin measuring.
stepLabel.reviewAnswers: Review your answers and upload them before continuing.
stepLabel.checkRecent: Check your recent measurements before you continue.
stepLabel.question: Answer the questions below to continue to do the measurement.
stepLabel.measurement: Below you can see and edit the answers given in the questions.
stepLabel.analysis: Check out the measurement data and accept or discard.

resume.invalidState: This measurement could not be resumed safely. Please start it again.

endFlow.alertMessage: If you finish now, this measurement will not be saved.

experimentSelection.heading: Select experiment
experimentSelection.loadFailed: Failed to load experiments. Please try again.
experimentSelection.deviceBannerBody: Connect a measurement device to capture readings.

exitSheet.title: Exit measurement?
exitSheet.body: You're on step {{step}} of {{total}}. Pause to keep your progress, or discard to start over later.
exitSheet.pauseSub: We'll save your answers and progress.
exitSheet.discardSub: Throw away this attempt and start over.

cameraPermission.deniedMessage: Camera access has been permanently denied. Open your device settings to enable it for openJII.
cameraPermission.requiredMessage: openJII needs access to your camera to scan QR codes.

qrScanner.alignPrompt: Align a QR code within the frame
qrScanner.matchNote: The QR code must match exactly one of the available options.

macroResult.noDataMessage: Please complete the measurement step first

resolution.COMMAND_CELL_MISSING: This command is no longer part of the loaded workbook. Reload the measurement.
resolution.COMMAND_PROVENANCE_MISSING: Restart this measurement before running the command.
resolution.COMMAND_SOURCE_MISSING: Run the referenced source step in this measurement, then try again.
resolution.COMMAND_SOURCE_INELIGIBLE: The referenced source cannot provide a command value.
resolution.COMMAND_SOURCE_NOT_EARLIER: The referenced source must appear before this command.
resolution.COMMAND_FIELD_EMPTY: Choose a source field for this command.
resolution.COMMAND_OUTPUT_MISSING: Run the referenced source step in this measurement, then try again.
resolution.COMMAND_OUTPUT_DUPLICATE: The source has conflicting outputs. Restart this measurement.
resolution.COMMAND_OUTPUT_INVALID: The source output is invalid. Rerun the source step.
resolution.COMMAND_SOURCE_STALE: The source result is from an older measurement cycle. Rerun the source.
resolution.DEVICE_OUTPUT_MISSING: Rerun the source step with this connected sensor.
resolution.DEVICE_OUTPUT_DUPLICATE: This sensor has conflicting source results. Rerun the source.
resolution.SOURCE_DEVICE_FAILED: The source step failed for this sensor. Rerun it first.
resolution.COMMAND_FIELD_MISSING: The selected field is missing from the source result.
resolution.COMMAND_VALUE_NOT_STRING: The selected field must contain text.
resolution.COMMAND_VALUE_EMPTY: The selected field is empty. Rerun or correct the source.
resolution.COMMAND_TRANSPORT_FAILED: The command could not be sent to this sensor. Reconnect and try again.

noDevice.connectFirst: Please connect to a device first

readyState.noQuestions: This experiment has no questions, start measuring directly!

scanning.title: Measuring
scanning.interactionHint: This protocol pauses for you to open and close the clamp. Watch the device and act when its lights prompt you.

toast.protocolUnavailable: Protocol unavailable, connect to the internet and try again
toast.deviceDisconnected: Device disconnected, reconnect and try again

measurementNode.privacyNote: Your (gps)location and full name will be stored amongst other measurements data. Note that these are publicly available.

completed.emptyAll: Your uploaded measurement will appear here
completed.uploadAlertMessage: Are you sure you want to upload "{{experimentName}}"?
completed.removeAlertMessage: "{{experimentName}}" is already uploaded to the cloud. Remove it from this phone? The cloud copy stays intact.
completed.deleteAlertMessage: "{{experimentName}}" has not been uploaded yet. Deleting it now means the measurement will be lost permanently.
completed.deleteBlockedUploading: Can't delete while uploading, try again in a moment.

flowStates.error: Failed to load experiment. Please try again.
